nasb.text: He blessed him and said, “Blessed be Abram of God Most High, Possessor of heaven and earth;

esv.text: And he blessed him and said, “Blessed be Abram by God Most High, Possessor of heaven and earth;

cnv.text: 他給亞伯蘭祝福，說： “願創造天地的主、至高的　神， 賜福給亞伯蘭。

ccb.text: 他祝福亚伯兰说： “愿创造天地的主、至高的上帝赐福给亚伯兰！

csbs.text: 他祝福亚伯兰，说： “愿至高的神、天地的主宰祝福亚伯兰！
